zh.lifeSummary: 當Captain Thomas Woodhouse於1518年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾吉波利時，他的父親Roger Woodhouse29歲，母親Elizabeth Radcliffe28歲。他和Margaret Shelton至少有5個兒子和8個女兒。他於1588年登記服兵役。他於1589年在愛爾蘭被列為glass maker。他去世於1600年在愛爾蘭享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Woodhouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places (in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Yorkshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, and elsewhere) called Woodhouse, or a topographic name for someone who lived at a ‘house in the wood’ (Middle English wode, hous, Old English wudu, hūs).

variant of Woodiwiss , from Middle English wodewose, which by the 16th century was sometimes written as wodowes, woodose, and wodehouse. The confusion with woodhouse probably arose because both words (and both names) were pronounced /wudus/ or /wudǝs/ in local dialect.

variants.name: Woodis
meanings: perhaps a nickname from Old English wuduwāsa‘faun, satyr’.
alternatively, a shortened form of   Woodhouse  .

variants.name: Woodiwiss
meanings: English (mainly Derbyshire and Yorkshire): nickname from Middle English wodewose, wodewese (Old English wudewāse) ‘wild man of the woods’. This word was also used to denote a person dressed to represent such a being in a play or pageant. Wodewoses (male and female) were mythical creatures of English and ancient Germanic folklore, akin to the fauns and satyrs of Classical mythology. The surname may also have been acquired by someone who lived and worked in the woods or perhaps by an unusually hairy man.

nameMeanings.name: Captain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Constant, Emile, Marcell.

Americanized form (translation into English) of French Capitaine, Dutch Captein or Kaptein , Italian Capitano , German and Polish or other Slavic Kapitan , Hungarian Kapitány, and Greek Kapetanos, all status names from a title meaning ‘captain’ (ultimately from Late Latin capitaneus ‘chief’, ‘principal’ from caput ‘head’), used to denote a master of a ship, a high-ranking official, a headman, or a person of military rank. In North America, the surname Captain may also be derived (shortened and translated) from various Greek patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Kapetanopoulos. Compare Capitan .

variants.name: Capitano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Sal, Angelo, Gilda, Orazio, Sarina.
Italian (Sicily and Naples): status name from capitano ‘captain’, a title denoting the master of a ship, an official of some kind, or an officer in the army. Compare Captain .

variants.name: Kapitan
meanings: From Late Latin Capito, originally a nickname meaning ‘big-headed’; the name of a missionary who preached in the Crimea and south Russia in the 4th century.

variants.name: Kaptein
meanings: Dutch: status name from kaptein, a title meaning ‘captain’. Compare Captain .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Captain Thomas Woodhouse was born in 1518, in Kimberley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Woodhouse, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Radcliffe, was 28. He had at least 5 sons and 8 daughters with Margaret Shelton. He registered for military service in 1588. In 1589, at the age of 71, his occupation is listed as glass maker in Ireland. He died in 1600, in Ireland, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Captain Thomas Woodhouse est né en 1518, à Kimberley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Woodhouse, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Radcliffe, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles avec Margaret Shelton. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1588. En 1589, à l’âge de 71 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est glass maker à Irlande. Il est décédé en 1600, à Irlande, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.Dungannon, County Tyrone, Northern Irela: Dungannon, County Tyrone, Nordirland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Captain Thomas Woodhouse 1518 in Kimberley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Woodhouse 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Radcliffe 28. Er hatte mit Margaret Shelton mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er hat sich 1588 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1589, als er 71 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als glass maker in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb 1600 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Irland.

Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie con Margaret Shelton. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1588. Nel 1589, all'età di 71 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come glass maker nel Irlanda. Morì nel 1600, nel Irlanda, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Captain Thomas Woodhouseが1518年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアキンバーリーで生まれた時，父Roger Woodhouseは29歳，母Elizabeth Radcliffeは28歳であった。彼はMargaret Sheltonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘をもうけた。彼は1588年に兵役登録をした。1589年，71歳の時，アイルランドでの職業はglass makerと記録されている。彼は1600年にアイルランドで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Captain Thomas Woodhouse(이)가 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 킴벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Woodhouse(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Radcliffe(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Margaret Shelton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1588년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1589년, 71세의 나이로 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 glass maker이었다. 그는 1600년 아일랜드에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas com Margaret Shelton. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1588. Em 1589, com 71 anos, sua profissão aparece como glass maker em Irlanda. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Captain Thomas Woodhouse родился в 1518 г. в местности кимбирли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Woodhouse было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Radcliffe, 28. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей от Margaret Shelton. В 1588 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1589 году, в возрасте 71 год, работал по профессии glass maker в местности Ирландия. Он умер в 1600 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 82 лет.
